title: Connect wallet and choose tenant role
description: Verifies a new user can connect a wallet, choose the tenant role, and reach the tenant onboarding outcome for that wallet.

steps.description: Verify the tenant dashboard or onboarding outcome is shown for the connected wallet

title: Tenant runs a private verification from a shared link
description: A tenant can open a share link, review the requirements, run verification, and arrive at a shared result page with an eligibility outcome.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Navigate to a tenant share verification link
Verify the verification result page is displayed
Verify an eligibility outcome is visible

title: Connect wallet and choose landlord role
description: Verifies a new user can connect a wallet, choose the landlord role, and reach the landlord onboarding outcome for that wallet.

steps.description: Verify the landlord dashboard or onboarding outcome is shown for the connected wallet

title: Unauthenticated user is prevented from opening tenant profile and verification routes
description: An unauthenticated user is redirected away from protected tenant routes and is prompted to authenticate.

steps.description: Verify the login page is displayed
Navigate to a tenant share verification link
Verify access to the verification flow is blocked

title: Unauthenticated user is prevented from opening protected landlord routes
description: An unauthenticated user is redirected away from protected landlord pages and is prompted to authenticate.

steps.description: Verify the login page is displayed
Verify access to the landlord area is blocked

title: Open the shared verification result page
description: Verifies an anonymous viewer can open a shared verification result and see the overall pass or fail outcome with requirement indicators only.

steps.description: Navigate to a shared verification result page
Verify the overall pass or fail result is visible
Verify requirement indicators are visible without raw salary, credit, or employment details

title: Tenant reaches the dashboard after role onboarding
description: A tenant can connect a wallet, choose the tenant role, and land on the tenant dashboard.

steps.description: Verify the tenant dashboard is displayed

title: Return to the same wallet with the assigned role
description: Verifies a wallet that has already chosen a role is recognized on future visits and remains locked to that role.

steps.description: Verify the previously assigned role outcome is shown for the connected wallet

title: Landlord reaches the dashboard after role onboarding
description: A landlord can connect a wallet, choose the landlord role, and land on the landlord dashboard with access to landlord navigation.

steps.description: Verify the landlord dashboard is displayed

title: Anonymous viewer inspects a shared verification result
description: An anonymous viewer can open a shared result page and inspect the overall verdict with requirement indicators but no raw private data.

steps.description: Navigate to a shared verification result link
Verify the overall verdict is visible

title: Create a property screening request successfully
description: Verifies a landlord can create a screening request with rent and requirement criteria and see the new request details afterward.

steps.description: Set the monthly rent with a valid currency and amount
Set a valid minimum credit score
Set a valid minimum employment duration
Verify the new screening request details are displayed
Verify a shareable verification link is visible

title: Landlord creates a new property screening request
description: A landlord can create a new screening request and see it added to their landlord property workflow.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the property screening details
Verify the new screening request is displayed
Verify the request is available in the landlord workflow

title: Create a tenant profile successfully
description: Verifies a tenant can save an encrypted profile with salary, credit score, and employment duration and see it saved successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the monthly salary field with a valid amount and currency
Fill in the credit score field with a valid score
Select a valid employment duration range
Verify a saved profile confirmation is visible
Verify the profile status shows the tenant profile is available

title: Tenant creates an encrypted profile
description: A tenant can complete the profile flow and see their encrypted profile status reflected in the app.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the profile fields with valid tenant information
Verify the profile status is displayed

title: Landlord reviews property screening cards
description: A landlord can open the properties view and see screening cards for their properties.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify property screening cards are displayed
Verify each property card shows screening context

title: Update an existing tenant profile
description: Verifies a tenant can change profile details and save the updated encrypted profile so the new information replaces the previous one.

steps.description: Fill in the monthly salary field with a new valid amount and currency
Fill in the credit score field with a new valid score
Select a different valid employment duration range
Verify a saved profile confirmation is visible
Verify the updated profile status is shown

title: Landlord copies a verification link from a property
description: A landlord can open a property detail view and copy the verification link for sharing with a tenant.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a copy confirmation is visible
Verify the property detail context remains visible

title: Show the created screening in the landlord property list
description: Verifies a newly created screening appears in the landlord properties list so the landlord can manage it later.

steps.description: Set the monthly rent with a valid currency and amount
Set a valid minimum credit score
Set a valid minimum employment duration
Verify the new screening appears in the property list

title: Tenant updates an existing encrypted profile
description: A tenant can edit an existing profile and see the updated profile state reflected afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Change an existing profile field to a valid new value
Verify the updated profile is saved
Verify the updated profile status is displayed

title: Landlord reviews a shared result from the results page
description: A landlord can open a shared verification result from the results page and confirm only pass or fail style outcome information is shown.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the overall verdict is visible

title: Landlord opens cross-property applicant results
description: A landlord can browse the cross-property results table and open an applicant outcome for review.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the applicant result details are displayed
Verify the verification outcome is visible

title: Tenant reviews verification history and opens a past result
description: A tenant can view verification history on the dashboard and open a previous result for details.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the verification outcome is visible
Verify the result details are displayed

title: Reject invalid tenant profile values
description: Verifies the tenant profile form blocks submission when salary, credit score, or employment duration inputs are outside valid ranges.

steps.description: Fill in an invalid salary value and currency
Fill in an invalid credit score
Select an invalid employment duration range
Verify the profile is not saved

title: Reject invalid landlord screening values
description: Verifies the landlord screening form shows validation errors when rent or requirement inputs are outside valid ranges.

steps.description: Fill in an invalid rent value and currency
Set an invalid minimum credit score
Set an invalid minimum employment duration
Verify the request is not created
